title: Review Cost Breakdown During Session

findings.description: No cost or token breakdown UI is visible in the chat interface. The status bar shows model name (Sonnet 4.6), mode (Normal), and branch (main) but no cost/token metrics.
findings.expected: A cost/token usage breakdown panel or indicator should be available during or after a chat session.
findings.actual: No cost breakdown UI exists anywhere in the new chat view or status bar.

verdict: Feature not yet implemented. No UI element for cost/token breakdown exists in the current chat interface.
